body: {"q": "RwLock", "matches": [{"f": "AGENTS.md", "l": 69, "txt": "- Be very careful around locking - prefer RwLock over Mutex for read-heavy workloads"}, {"f": "crates/ffs-core/src/dbs/lmdb.rs", "l": 5, "txt": "use std::sync::RwLock;"}, {"f": "crates/ffs-core/src/file_picker.rs", "l": 118, "txt": "    bigram_overlay: Option<Arc<parking_lot::RwLock<BigramOverlay>>>,"}, {"f": "crates/ffs-core/src/lib.rs", "l": 25, "txt": "//! newtype wrappers around `Arc<RwLock<Option<T>>>` for thread-safe shared"}, {"f": "crates/ffs-core/src/shared.rs", "l": 2, "txt": "use std::sync::{Arc, RwLock, RwLockReadGuard, RwLockWriteGuard, Weak};"}, {"f": "scripts/extract-demo-data.sh", "l": 72, "txt": "for pattern in \"fn \" \"struct \" \"RwLock\" \"unsafe\" \"TODO\" \"fuzzy_file_search\"; do"}], "total": 23}
